name: sa-idv-advertiser
description: Seek advertiser IDV (demo/open mode). Requires mobileConfirmationCode (4 digits sent to Seek mobile app) and seekId (6-character Seek PIN) in one call. Any valid-format values are accepted and return VERIFIED.

mobileConfirmationCode.description: Required. Exactly 4 digits — the confirmation code sent to the Seek mobile app. Aliases: confirmationCode, mobileCode, otp, verificationCode.

seekId.description: Required. Exactly 6 characters (letters and/or numbers) — the Seek account PIN. Aliases: seekPin, pin.

companyName.description: Optional employer/organisation name. Aliases: organisationName, organizationName.

contactName.description: Optional contact name. Aliases: name, fullName.

phone.description: Optional contact phone. Aliases: phoneNumber, mobile.
